name: HHR_VLTR_TEAM_BASIC_INFO_VL
query: SELECT TEAM.TEAM_ID, TEAM.TEAM_NAME, TEAM.DESCRIPTION, TEAM_MEMBERS.TEAM_MEMBERS, TEAM.CREATED_BY, TEAM.CREATION_DATE, TEAM.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, TEAM.LAST_UPDATED_BY, TEAM.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HWR_TEAM TEAM, (SELECT TEAM.TEAM_ID, COUNT(TEAM_MEMBER.PERSON_ID) TEAM_MEMBERS FROM HWR_TEAM TEAM, HWR_TEAM_MEMBER TEAM_MEMBER WHERE TEAM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND TEAM.TEAM_ID = TEAM_MEMBER.TEAM_ID AND TEAM_MEMBER.IS_DELETED = 0 AND TEAM_MEMBER.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY TEAM.TEAM_ID) TEAM_MEMBERS WHERE TEAM.TEAM_ID = TEAM_MEMBERS.TEAM_ID
